Author & Biblical Scholar

Henk Keet

Author of Eindtyd and The Cosmic Harmony Operator — exploring Biblical prophecy, quantum gravity, and the intersection of faith and science. With 28 years in security and a lifetime of faith, Henk brings a unique perspective to his writing.

Explore Books Get in Touch
About the Author
01

Henk Keet is a South African security professional with more than 28 years of experience in armed response. Through his work, he has encountered many real-life situations that have given him a deep appreciation for his faith and the future of the world.

Now at 65, Henk continues to work and plans to retire by 2027 as a pastor. Together with his family, he has a deep interest in Biblical prophecy, especially regarding the end times and the second coming of Jesus Christ.

His personal study of the Bible and his disappointment with how the concept of God is often presented in our uncertain world motivated him to write this book — to help readers navigate through faith and to prepare for the future.

Eindtyd weerspieël sy persoonlike studie van die Bybel en sy ontsteltenis dat die begrip van God se Woord mense kan help om deur 'n onseker wêreld te navigeer. Deur hierdie boek hoop hy om lesers aan te moedig om oor hul geloof te besin en om gereed te wees vir die toekoms.

Henk Keet

Author & Security Professional

Published Works
Biblical Prophecy

EINDTYD

Asemrowende Berekeninge oor die Eindtyd datums

(Breathtaking Calculations about the End Times dates)

A thought-provoking exploration of Biblical prophecy that takes readers on a journey to the end of time. This book examines the book of Revelation and other prophetic scriptures, the historical fulfillment of prophecy, and the central role of Israel in God's plan of redemption.

✦

The historical fulfillment of prophecy through the ages

✦

The central role of Israel in God's redemptive plan

✦

Technological and scientific developments in prophecy

✦

A clearer understanding of Jesus Christ and ultimate hope

ISBN 978-1-0492-5565-1
Publisher Bookmaak SA
Language Afrikaans
Genre Biblical Prophecy

Science & Spirituality

The Cosmic Harmony Operator

Theory of Everything & Quantum Gravity

A groundbreaking exploration bridging the gap between quantum physics and cosmic harmony. Henk Keet delves into the mysteries of the universe, examining how the fundamental forces of nature may be unified through a single, elegant operator.

✦

Exploring the Theory of Everything

✦

Quantum gravity and cosmic structures

✦

The harmony between science and creation

✦
